title: Responsive CSS, Reflow, Progressive Enhancement, and Performance Budgets · Language Clinic: Mobile First Shell
summary: Generated pages assume one viewport, content clips at zoom, navigation depends on JavaScript, fonts block text, images shift layout, and a fast home page hides slow long-form routes. Predict the reader decision, source identity, parse state, output URL, accessibility result, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the mobile first shell increment in responsive progressively enhanced performance budget. Learners progress through prediction, exp…
objectives: Build intrinsic layouts with content-driven breakpoints, logical properties, flexible media, readable measures, and no fixed-viewport dependency.
Combine structural checks, keyboard and zoom review, screen-reader tasks, content review, changed routes, and human ownership.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-worked-static-site-responsive-performance-3
# Competency: ssg-worked-static-site-responsive-performance-3.
# Case 5798: a large technical reference incremental rebuild.
# Operating constraint: retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity.
# Changed case: insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic.
def worked_static_site_responsive_performance_3(viewports: int = 3, reflow_passes: int = 3, page_kib: int = 180, page_budget_kib: int = 220, layout_shifts: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "readerworked3",
        "source5798",
        "parse3dekrow",
        "routeworked35798",
        "artifact5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if viewports < 3 or reflow_passes < 0:
        return False, reflow_passes, "viewport-matrix"
    if reflow_passes != viewports:
        return False, reflow_passes, "reflow-failure"
    if page_kib < 0 or page_kib > page_budget_kib:
        return False, page_kib, "resource-budget"
    if layout_shifts > 0:
        return False, layout_shifts, "layout-instability"
    assert reflow_passes == viewports
    return True, page_kib, "responsive-budget"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Build Mobile First Shell evidence · Theory Mobile First Shell

Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native filesystem, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validator, browser, GitHub, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN, cache, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, CommonMark 0.31.2 fixtures, markdown-it-py 4.2.0, Jinja 3.1.6 strict autoescape, pytest 9.1.1, standards validators, real browsers, clean package installs, reproducible artifacts, staged deployment, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-mobile-first-shell-14yml3
# Competency: ssg-mobile-first-shell.
# Case 7339: a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment.
# Operating constraint: reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval.
# Changed case: rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence.
def evidence_ssg_mobile_first_shell_14yml3(viewports: int = 3, reflow_passes: int = 3, page_kib: int = 180, page_budget_kib: int = 220, layout_shifts: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_14yml3 = "14yml3-3lmy41-7339"
    assert evidence_variant_14yml3
    evidence_axes_14yml3 = (
        "reader14yml3",
        "source7339",
        "parse3lmy41",
        "route14yml37339",
        "artifact733914yml3",
        "recovery3lmy417339",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_14yml3)) == 6
    if viewports < 3 or reflow_passes < 0:
        return False, reflow_passes, "viewport-matrix"
    if reflow_passes != viewports:
        return False, reflow_passes, "reflow-failure"
    if page_kib < 0 or page_kib > page_budget_kib:
        return False, page_kib, "resource-budget"
    if layout_shifts > 0:
        return False, layout_shifts, "layout-instability"
    assert reflow_passes == viewports
    return True, page_kib, "responsive-budget"
